channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [EXIDEIND] Exide Industries Recommends ₹2 Dividend for FY26
item.description:
Exide Industries Ltd's Board of Directors approved the audited financial results for the year ended March 31, 2026. They recommended a dividend of ₹2 per equity share (200%) subject to shareholder approval at the 79th AGM. The record date for the dividend is July 3, 2026, with payment within 30 days of the AGM. The AGM will be held on July 10, 2026, via video conferencing. Auditors M/s B S R & Co. LLP issued an unmodified opinion on the financial results.

  • Audited financial results for the year ended March 2026 approved.
  • Dividend of ₹2 per share (200%) recommended, pending shareholder approval.
  • Record date for dividend payment is July 3, 2026.
  • 79th AGM to be held on July 10, 2026, via video conferencing.
  • Auditors issued an unmodified opinion on the financial results.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: EXIDE INDUSTRIES LTD. | Category: Dividend

item.title: [AVI] AVI Polymers to Consider ₹500 Cr Fundraising on May 7, 2026
item.description:
🔥 Trending

AVI Polymers Ltd has scheduled a Board of Directors meeting on May 7, 2026, to consider and approve a proposal for fund raising up to ₹500 Crore through various methods including qualified institutional placement, private placement, or preferential issue. The board will also consider adding new objects to the Memorandum of Association, including information technology and digital platforms. The trading window will be closed from May 4, 2026, until 48 hours after the board meeting.

  • Board to consider fund raising up to ₹500 Crore on May 7, 2026.
  • Fund raising may involve QIP, private placement, or preferential issue.
  • Board to consider acquisition methods including share purchase or swap.
  • Company to consider adding IT and digital platforms to its objectives.
  • Trading window closed from May 4, 2026 until 48 hours post meeting.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: AVI Polymers Ltd | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [AVI] AVI Polymers: Board to Consider ₹500 Cr Fundraise
item.description:
🔥 Trending

AVI Polymers Ltd has announced a board meeting on May 7, 2026, to consider and approve a fund-raising proposal of approximately ₹500 Crore through qualified institutional placement, private placement, or other permissible modes. The board will also consider new business objects including information technology, software development, and digital platforms. The trading window will be closed from May 4, 2026, until 48 hours after the board meeting.

  • AVI Polymers to consider ₹500 Cr fundraise via various instruments.
  • Board to evaluate acquisitions via share purchase or swap.
  • Company to consider adding IT, software, and digital platforms to its objectives.
  • Trading window closed from May 4, 2026, until 48 hours post board meeting.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: AVI Polymers Ltd | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [KMSUGAR] K M Sugar Mills Board Meeting on May 18, 2026
item.description:
K M Sugar Mills Ltd has scheduled a Board of Directors meeting on May 18, 2026, to consider and approve the audited standalone and consolidated financial results for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026. The trading window has been closed from April 1, 2026, until 48 hours after the declaration of the financial results.

  • Board meeting scheduled for May 18, 2026, to approve financial results.
  • Audited standalone and consolidated results for FY26 will be considered.
  • Trading window closed from April 1, 2026, until 48 hours post results.
  • Notice available on the company's website and stock exchanges.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: K.M.SUGAR MILLS LTD. | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [ORIENTHOT] Oriental Hotels: FY26 Revenue ₹491.44 Mn, Dividend ₹0.65/Share
item.description:
Oriental Hotels Ltd approved audited standalone and consolidated financial results for the year ended March 31, 2026. The company reported revenue from operations of ₹491.44 million and recommended a dividend of ₹0.65 per equity share. The board also approved the appointment of Mr. Venkatesh Rajagopal and Mr. Suraj Krishna Moraje as Additional Independent Non-Executive Directors, subject to shareholder approval.

  • Approved audited financial results for the year ended March 31, 2026.
  • Recommended a dividend of ₹0.65 per equity share for FY26.
  • Appointed Mr. Venkatesh Rajagopal as an Additional Independent Non-Executive Director.
  • Appointed Mr. Suraj Krishna Moraje as an Additional Independent Non-Executive Director.
  • FY26 Revenue from Operations stood at ₹491.44 million.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: ORIENTAL HOTELS LTD. | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [SAVFI] Mantra Capital: AUM Crosses ₹110 Cr in Q4FY26
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Mantra Capital Ltd (formerly Savani Financials Limited), a BSE-listed, RBI-regulated NBFC, announced that its Assets Under Management (AUM) crossed ₹110 Crores as of March 2026. The company focuses on providing credit to entrepreneur-led businesses in India, with operations in South India and Delhi NCR. It has crossed 2500 borrowers with 19 branches and an employee base of 176. The company focuses on a 100% secured loan portfolio and has strategic partnerships with Mahindra, OSM, and Greaves.

  • Mantra Capital's AUM crossed ₹110 Crores as of March 2026.
  • The company has crossed 2500 borrowers.
  • Mantra Capital operates with 19 branches and 176 employees.
  • The company maintains a 100% secured loan portfolio.
  • Strategic partnerships include Mahindra, OSM, and Greaves.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: SAVANI FINANCIALS LTD. | Category: Quarterly Updates

item.title: [EXIDEIND] Exide Industries Approves FY26 Results, Declares ₹2 Dividend
item.description:
Exide Industries Ltd's Board of Directors approved the audited financial results (standalone and consolidated) for the year ended March 31, 2026. The board has recommended a dividend of ₹2 per equity share of face value of Re. 1 each (200%) for FY26, subject to shareholder approval at the 79th AGM. The record date for the dividend is July 3, 2026, with payment within 30 days after the AGM. The 79th AGM will be held on July 10, 2026, via video conferencing. Auditors M/s B S R & Co. LLP have not expressed any modified opinions in their audit report.

  • Exide Industries approves audited financial results for FY26.
  • Board recommends a dividend of ₹2 per share (200%) for FY26.
  • Record date for dividend payment is set for July 3, 2026.
  • 79th Annual General Meeting scheduled for July 10, 2026, via VC.
  • Auditors issued an unmodified opinion on the financial results.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: EXIDE INDUSTRIES LTD. | Category: Dividend

item.title: [KCP] KCP Ltd Board Meeting on May 28, 2026 to Consider Results
item.description:
KCP Ltd has scheduled a Board of Directors meeting on May 28, 2026, to consider and approve the audited standalone and consolidated financial results for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026. The meeting will be held at the company's registered office in Chennai. The trading window for dealing in the company's equity shares is closed from April 1, 2026, and will remain closed until 48 hours after the declaration of the financial results.

  • KCP Ltd's board meeting is scheduled for May 28, 2026.
  • The board will consider audited financial results for Q4 and FY26.
  • Meeting to be held at the company's registered office in Chennai.
  • Trading window closed until 48 hours post results declaration.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: K.C.P.LTD. | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [ORIENTHOT] Oriental Hotels Appoints Venkatesh Rajagopal & Suraj Moraje as Directors
item.description:
Oriental Hotels Ltd's Board of Directors, in a meeting on May 4, 2026, approved the appointment of Mr. Venkatesh Rajagopal and Mr. Suraj Krishna Moraje as Additional Directors in the category of Independent Non-Executive Directors. Their term is for 5 years, effective from May 5, 2026, subject to shareholder approval. Both directors are not debarred from holding office and are not related to any other director of the company.

  • Venkatesh Rajagopal and Suraj Krishna Moraje appointed as Additional Independent Non-Executive Directors.
  • Appointments effective May 5, 2026, for a 5-year term, pending shareholder approval.
  • Both appointees are not related to any existing directors.
  • Neither appointee is debarred from holding the office of director.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: ORIENTAL HOTELS LTD. | Category: Management Change

item.title: [ORIENTHOT] Oriental Hotels: FY26 Revenue ₹491.44 Mn, Dividend ₹0.65
item.description:
Oriental Hotels Ltd. approved audited standalone and consolidated financial results for the year ended March 31, 2026. The company reported revenue from operations of ₹491.44 million and recommended a dividend of Re. 0.65 per equity share. The board also approved the appointment of Mr. Venkatesh Rajagopal and Mr. Suraj Krishna Moraje as Additional Independent Non-Executive Directors, subject to shareholder approval.

  • Oriental Hotels' FY26 revenue from operations reached ₹491.44 million.
  • A dividend of Re. 0.65 per equity share was recommended for FY26.
  • Venkatesh Rajagopal and Suraj Krishna Moraje appointed as Additional Independent Non-Executive Directors.
  • Audited standalone and consolidated financial statements for FY26 approved.
  • Board meeting commenced at 11.05 A.M. and concluded at 01.30 P.M.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: ORIENTAL HOTELS LTD. | Category: Quarterly Result
